description_for_human: Search and browse Microsoft Research publications, researchers, projects, and research areas.
description_for_model: Plugin for querying the Microsoft Research data API. Use this to search across MSR content, look up researcher profiles, browse publications, and list research areas.

functions.name: searchContent
functions.description: Search across all MSR content including publications, researchers, and projects. Returns ranked results with titles, descriptions, and links.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

functions.name: getResearcher
functions.description: Get detailed information about a specific Microsoft researcher including their bio, lab, research areas, and publication count.

name.description: Name of the researcher to look up

functions.name: getPublications
functions.description: Browse and search academic publications from Microsoft Research. Filter by topic, author, or year.

limit.description: Maximum number of publications to return

functions.name: getResearchAreas
functions.description: List all research areas and labs at Microsoft Research with descriptions and counts.
